description: GEflfHJS OF LIBERTY 44 Truth crushed to earth will rite again The eternal year of God are hers But Error wounded writhes in pain And dies arttid her worshipers SATURDAY MARCH 20 1811 RENWICKS LIFE OF JOHN JAY A friend has sent us a copy of the New York American which contains a letter from William Jay exposing the base at tempt todestroy the consistency and purity of character of that eminent statesman John Jay at the dictation of Slavery by endeavoring to represent him as fiiendly to that fell spirit VYm Jay is the son of John Jay and wrote the biography of his father which was published by the Har pers in 1833 before the South had con trol of their press Since then it has been thought that another biography was required to make up a part of Harpers Dis trict School Library The former memoir and the true character of that eminent man appeared no doubt too incendiary to he put into the hands of the youth who are to wield the future destinies of the nation and Prof Renwick was found to be the man that would make just such a book as slavery demanded
